verdict_scope: This verdict closes the BEM-949 P7 release-audit stage. It is NOT a Broad Release PASS and does not certify RULE-005..RULE-010 as runtime-enforced.
independent_verification_performed: DSM-1: re-fetched governance/proofs/BEM949_dsm1_runtime_hardening_receipt_verified.json (sha 8724708f...) directly; cross-checked against governance/state/dispatch_lifecycle.jsonl and an operator-supplied real GitHub Actions job log for run_id 28614313748. Confirmed genuine.

P5/RV2 contradiction: hash-verified governance/proofs/BEM949_p5_rv2_contradiction_investigation_receipt.json (sha e5e3acc2...) AND independently read governance/runners/bem949_rule_enforcement_runner.py (sha 73bfe9b4...) to confirm the forensic claim first-hand -- the runner genuinely only validates registry-schema completeness and schema-mutation rejection, never operational rule enforcement. This confirms the investigation's conclusion (scope overclaim in P5, not a proven regression) rather than accepting it on the investigation's word alone.

binding_findings_carried_forward.RULE-004: code_enforced, scope limited to registry-schema validation only
binding_findings_carried_forward.P1-CI-STABILIZE: remains BLOCKED_OPERATOR_DECISION, out of scope for this verdict
binding_findings_carried_forward.T7_autopilot_race_condition: remains open pending a live GitHub Actions concurrency test; explicitly not a precondition for this verdict per the audit package's own scope

conditions_of_approval: Any future claim of 'Broad Release PASS' for BEM-949 must not cite this verdict as covering RULE-005..RULE-010 runtime enforcement.
T7 must still be closed with live concurrency evidence before the autopilot pipeline itself is considered reliable; this verdict does not depend on and does not certify that.
Historical P5 and RV-2 receipts remain unmodified, as required; this verdict relies on the investigation receipt's reconciliation, not on rewriting either original artifact.
non_claims: This is not a certification that the full BEM-949 system is production-ready.
This is not a certification of RULE-005..RULE-010 operational enforcement.
This is not a certification of autopilot concurrency safety (T7).
